items.headline: Council to discuss three lawsuits against Cupertino in closed session
items.summary: The council is scheduled to meet in closed session on pending litigation including Lixin (Leon) Chen et al. v. City of Cupertino, Yes in My Backyard et al. v. City of Cupertino, and Garden Gate Coalition for Mary Avenue Safety v. City of Cupertino, all filed in Santa Clara County Superior Court.

items.headline: Two ADUs permitted at same multi-family lot on Lewis Road
items.summary: Permits were issued for two detached one-story ADUs (#5 and #6) at 458 Lewis Rd, a multi-family lot, valued at $131,764 each. Adding two units at once on a single lot is unusual compared to the typical single-ADU permits filed elsewhere in the city this week.
